hypothesis: If universal machine learning interatomic potentials trained on diverse MOF-related data accurately capture the interatomic potential energy surface, then they will reproduce DFT-level structural optimization convergence and volume deviations, MD stability under NpT conditions at 300 K and 1 bar, bulk moduli from ±4% strain fits, and 300 K heat capacities for MOFs and related nanoporous materials, because their learned representations generalize across this chemical space.
